name: Bug report
about: Report something that does not work as expected
labels: bug

## Before you file (read once)

- **Using the deployed Choices site?** Prefer the **in-app feedback** control (floating button, when enabled). It posts to our **feedback pipeline** with **page URL, device, and optional screenshot** so triage matches what you saw. See [docs/FEEDBACK_AND_ISSUES.md](../../docs/FEEDBACK_AND_ISSUES.md).
- **Developing this repo / CI / local repro?** Use this GitHub template — we need **steps, versions, and logs** below.
- **Security vulnerabilities:** do **not** file here — use [SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md).
